div.p: Error Detection → Message Generation → Recovery Strategy

Synchronization: Skip tokens until a known synchronization point (semicolon, newline, major keyword like fi, done, esac) Panic Mode: Discard all input until sync point found. Used when error is severe. Resume: Attempt to continue parsing with minimal disruption. Used for minor errors.
Parser errors NEVER return partial AST. All allocated nodes are freed before return.
